transcript: so special is just how big it is not only is this the the most complete ichthyosaur skeleton ever found the biggest one ever found here in the uk incredible at 10 meters long but it's actually the biggest prehistoric reptile skeleton ever found here as well the most complete skeleton any prehistoric reptile so it's incredible the rutland ichthyosaur has now been removed from the mud and plans are being made as to how best to display one of britain's greatest ever fossil finds
